P0R04458: Poloidal Flow (Vertical): Hierarchical Predictive Coding (HPC) loop (Projection and Inference). | Toroidal Flow (Horizontal): Temporal evolution and synchronisation (UPDE). | The Central Void: The Source Field (L13).
P0R04459: This geometry encapsulates the closed-loop causality and the unified geometric nature of the SCPN, the architecture of a participatory universe co-creating itself.
